_note: GK detachment modifiers — game mechanics only. Engine loads this for DPP/SURV/MOB computation. Modeled as always-on; conditional effects noted in 'condition' field.

choices.name: Hallowed Re-rolls
choices.description: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1 for GREY KNIGHTS units

choices.name: Purifier Zeal
choices.description: Purifier Squads re-roll all failed hits when wholly within Hallowed Ground

choices.name: Dauntless Champions
choices.description: Paladin Squads gain +1 to wound when their Strength exceeds target Toughness

choices.name: Truesilver Aegis
choices.description: Feel No Pain 4+ vs mortal wounds for Paladin Squads

choices.name: Echojump Surge
choices.condition: after shooting, cannot charge same turn
choices.description: Interceptor Squads make D6+1" surge move after shooting (avg 4.5", rounded to 4)

choices.name: Astral Overlap
choices.description: Interceptor Squad gains Stealth (-1 to hit from ranged)

choices.name: Sustained Hatred
choices.condition: melee only, after passing Leadership test
choices.description: Melee attacks gain Sustained Hits 1 after passing Leadership test

choices.name: Lethal Hatred
choices.condition: melee only, after passing Leadership test
choices.description: Melee attacks gain Lethal Hits after passing Leadership test

choices.name: Rapid Redeployment
choices.description: Re-roll 1s to hit and wound after Deep Strike arrival

choices.name: Terminator Mobility
choices.description: Terminator-armoured units can Fall Back and shoot/charge

choices.name: Vehicle Assault Advance
choices.condition: Advance 6" and still shoot with Assault weapons
choices.description: Vehicles advance 6" and treat weapons as Assault

choices.name: Gate Extension
choices.condition: Gate of Infinity redeployment range extension
choices.description: Extended Gate of Infinity redeployment range

choices.name: Searing Soulflame
choices.description: Purgation Squad ranged attacks gain Sustained Hits 1

choices.name: Soul-Locked Advance
choices.description: Purgation Squads can move and still shoot
